title: First Post — Ranjan Dasgupta | The Beginning of Something
description: First post: the beginning of something. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Every feed has a first post. This site has many. Ranjan Dasgupta has been building in public—and in AdTech—for years. The first post is always a commitment. See the beginning, day 1, and origin story.

Work, About, Contact.

title: Last Post — Ranjan Dasgupta | For Now
description: Last post: for now. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: There's always a "last post" until there isn't. Ranjan Dasgupta is still here—Work, About, Contact. See the end, until next time, and see you on the other side for the meta version.

title: Page 1 of 1000 — Ranjan Dasgupta | A Long Story
description: Page 1 of 1000: a long story. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: This site has 125+ creative pages. Call this page 1 of 1000—aspirational. Ranjan Dasgupta has been building for nine-plus years; the story isn't over. See first post, the beginning, and Work. About, Contact.

title: Day 1 — Ranjan Dasgupta | The First Day
description: Day 1: the first day. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: Everyone has a day 1. Ranjan Dasgupta had his in AdTech at Google. That led to Glance, InMobi, and AdsGupta. See the day I started, year 1, and origin story. Work, About, Contact.

title: Year 1 — Ranjan Dasgupta | The First Year
description: Year 1: the first year. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: The first year in a new role or company sets the tone. Ranjan Dasgupta has had several year ones—Google, Glance, InMobi. Each one led to the next. See day 1, the beginning, and Work. About, Contact.

title: Million Dollar Idea — Ranjan Dasgupta | The Big One
description: Million dollar idea: the big one. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: Some ideas are worth a lot. Ranjan Dasgupta has been part of monetization at $200M+ scale at Glance. The "million dollar idea" is often a lot of small ideas—yield, fill, latency—done right. See Work, yield optimization, and programmatic. About, Contact.

title: The Beginning — Ranjan Dasgupta | How It Started
description: The beginning: how it started. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: This is one of many beginnings. Ranjan Dasgupta started in AdTech at Google. The beginning led to Glance ($200M+), InMobi, and this site. See origin story, first post, and day 1. Work, About, Contact.

title: The End — Ranjan Dasgupta | For Now
description: The end: for now. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: Not really. Ranjan Dasgupta is still building. But every story has an "end" until the next chapter. See last post, until next time, and see you on the other side. Work, About, Contact.

description: Until next time: so long. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content: So long. Not goodbye—Ranjan Dasgupta will be back. The site, the work, the contact form—they're all here. See see you on the other side, last post, and the end. Work, About.

title: See You on the Other Side — Ranjan Dasgupta | The Other Side
description: See you on the other side. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
breadcrumbName: See You on the Other Side
h1: See you on the other side.
content: The other side of what? The next project. The next role. The next click. Ranjan Dasgupta has been on many sides—Google, Glance, InMobi. The other side is always ahead. See until next time, the end, and Work. About, Contact.
